summary: A Straight Arrow News (SAN) television segment, anchored by Karah Rucker, reporting that ICE Houston arrested 214 illegal-alien child sex offenders, with mugshots, a news lower-third caption, and on-screen quote cards attributed to an ICE ERO Houston official. It is a broadcast news segment with no music or added styling.
notable_text: MIGRANT CHILD SEX OFFENDERS ARRESTED IN HOUSTON: ICE; KARAH RUCKER STRAIGHT ARROW NEWS; Unbiased. Straight Facts.; PAUL MCBRIDE ICE ENFORCEMENT AND REMOVAL OPERATIONS HOUSTON
